S.FORM: Waris Ahluwalia kawas tay 1974, Waris Ahluwalia, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Waris Ahluwalia kawas tay 1974, Waris Ahluwalia, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: waris~ɕ aħluwalia kawas~ɕ taj ****, waris~ɕ aħluwalia, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
